title: Remove admin token gate for public shareable URL access

requirements.summary: Remove the admin token gate from the frontend so the app is fully publicly accessible without requiring a caffeineAdminToken URL fragment
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app URL without any `#caffeineAdminToken=...` fragment loads the app normally with no authentication prompt or token check.
The `urlParams.ts` utility no longer reads, persists, or validates any `caffeineAdminToken` parameter.
No component in the app renders a token gate, token prompt, or access-denied state based on a missing admin token.
All four public routes (Home, Register IP, IP Database, Whitepaper) are accessible without any token in the URL.

file_operations.description: Remove all logic related to reading, persisting, or validating the `caffeineAdminToken` parameter. Keep only the generic URL parameter utility functions if they serve other purposes, or simplify the module to remove token-specific code entirely.

Remove any token gate checks, conditional rendering based on `caffeineAdminToken`, or access-denied redirects. Ensure all four public routes (Home, Register IP, IP Database, Whitepaper) are unconditionally accessible without token validation.

Remove any UI elements, state checks, or conditional rendering related to the admin token gate. Ensure the header displays the IPGT logo and navigation links without any token-based access restrictions.
Remove any initialization logic that checks for or validates the `caffeineAdminToken` before mounting the app. Ensure the app mounts immediately for all visitors without token checks.
